title: XiaoZhi
summary: Voice-first AI assistant for CardputerZero with activation, chat, and continuous listening.
description: XiaoZhi brings the xiaozhi.me voice assistant experience to CardputerZero with activation-code pairing, push-to-talk wake, bidirectional voice chat, server-side VAD, and continuous conversation flow. The package is tuned for the 320 x 170 framebuffer UI and ships as an APPLaunch-ready Debian package.

zh-CN.title: 小智语音助手
zh-CN.summary: 面向 CardputerZero 的语音 AI 助手，支持激活、对话和连续聆听。
zh-CN.description: XiaoZhi 将小智语音助手移植到 CardputerZero，提供激活码绑定、按键唤醒、双向语音对话、服务端 VAD 和连续对话体验。应用面向 320 x 170 framebuffer 屏幕优化，内置中文与 emoji 字体打包策略，并通过 APPLaunch 入口集成到设备主界面。

en.title: XiaoZhi Voice Assistant
en.summary: Voice-first AI assistant for CardputerZero with activation, chat, and continuous listening.
en.description: XiaoZhi brings the xiaozhi.me voice assistant experience to CardputerZero with activation-code pairing, push-to-talk wake, bidirectional voice chat, server-side VAD, and continuous conversation flow. The package is tuned for the 320 x 170 framebuffer UI and ships as an APPLaunch-ready Debian package.

ja.title: XiaoZhi 音声アシスタント
ja.summary: CardputerZero 向けの音声 AI アシスタント。認証、会話、連続リスニングに対応。
ja.description: XiaoZhi は xiaozhi.me の音声アシスタント体験を CardputerZero に移植したアプリです。アクティベーションコード連携、プッシュトゥトーク、双方向音声会話、サーバー側 VAD、連続会話フローを提供し、320 x 170 の framebuffer UI に最適化されています。
